description: cc-dm compaction resilience — preserves session identity context before compaction

hooks.command: echo 'IMPORTANT cc-dm state: This session may have a cc-dm identity registered in the database. The session ID in the MCP server instructions above is authoritative. On your next cc-dm interaction, call the who tool to match your session ID against active sessions and recover your display name, role, and project. Do NOT re-register — your registration persists in the database.'
